unity_only_policy: VFX are recipe-staged for Unity ParticleSystem/VFX Graph implementation only. No external DCC render or simulation dependency.

shared_limits.overdraw: avoid full-screen steam; keep puffs behind reticle and away from menu text
shared_limits.sparks_per_impact: 2-6 visible particles, capped per weapon fire event
shared_limits.emission_textures: use soft circular sprite or project-standard smoke; do not add large atlas dependency in this staging batch

recipes.color: steam white with warm amber edge
recipes.use: impact, pickup, secret reveal, enemy death

recipes.notes: high contrast against blackened iron; cap bursts under rapid fire
throttle repeat and pair with lock icon
directional animation must be readable in grayscale by position/time

recipes.shape: steam exhale plus small brass glitter
recipes.notes: protect this cue from hit spam; one death confirmation per enemy
